## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD or operations

## Validation

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`php artisan test` or equivalent target)
- [ ] I built frontend assets locally (`npm run build`) when applicable
- [ ] I verified formatting/lint (`vendor/bin/pint --test`) where applicable

## CI Gate Checklist

- [ ] `Lint (Pint)` must pass
- [ ] `Tests (Laravel)` must pass
- [ ] `Frontend Build (Vite)` must pass
- [ ] No required GitHub checks are bypassed

## Database And Migrations

- [ ] No migration changes
- [ ] Migration changes included and safe for production (`php artisan migrate --force`)
- [ ] Rollback path reviewed for this change

## Security And Production Impact

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Environment/config impact documented
- [ ] Queue, scheduler, or supervisor impact considered

## Deployment Notes

List any deployment steps needed beyond normal release procedure.

## Screenshots / Evidence

Add screenshots, terminal output, or test evidence if relevant.
